title: zanthoxylum coriaceum
intro: Zanthoxylum coriaceum, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Zanthoxylum, belonging to the family Rutaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum coriaceum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, as well as its potential in preventing the spread of certain diseases. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried preparations, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
